Site.name: Kiwi Cloud Homes
Site.tagline: Short-stay homes in New Zealand for Chinese guests

Landing.title: Settle in, then explore New Zealand
Landing.subtitle: A trusted, comfortable whole-home stay — designed with Chinese travellers in mind.
Landing.personaPrompt: Tell us why you're coming to New Zealand.
Landing.personaHint: We'll tailor the journey — from search filters to seasonal advice.

tourist.title: Tourist stay
tourist.blurb: Visiting New Zealand for sightseeing, business, or family — settle in like a local.

school.title: School visit
school.blurb: Visiting schools or accompanying your child for enrolment? Filter by region and school.

relocation.title: Relocation
relocation.blurb: For families relocating long-term or on an immigration path. Long-stay options coming soon.

Tourist.title: A cloud home for your trip
Tourist.intro: Whether you're sightseeing, on business, or visiting family, this is a comfortable base in New Zealand.

features.dates: Pick check-in and check-out dates, with live pricing and availability
features.tour: Walk through every room with a 360° tour before you book
features.inquiry: Book direct, or message the host to negotiate

School.title: School-visit journey
School.intro: Filter the property by the school you're visiting, then plan around the New Zealand school calendar.

SchoolSearch.title: Schools & kindergartens near the home
SchoolSearch.subtitle: Within {radius} km of the home, sorted nearest first.
SchoolSearch.noMatches: No matches — try a different keyword.

SchoolMatch.noSelection: Pick a school or kindergarten on the left to see distance, walking and driving times from the home.
SchoolMatch.estimateNote: Walking and driving times are estimates from average pace (5 km/h walking, 40 km/h urban driving). Real times vary with traffic.
SchoolMatch.durationHourMin: {h, plural, one {# h} other {# h}} {min} min

adviceText.in-zone: The home sits inside this school's zone — a walk or short drive. Great for longer enrolment stays.
adviceText.nearby: Close to this school, about a 10–20 minute drive. Workable for private or out-of-zone enrolments.
adviceText.further: A longer cross-city commute. Plan a full day for the visit, or a different stay for that leg of the trip.
adviceText.out-of-region: This school is in another region. Our home serves Christchurch trips; consider a stay closer to the school instead.

Seasons.title: Seasons · price + availability
Seasons.subtitle: New Zealand's school year and visitor calendar drive price and availability. Pick a season for our advice.

advice.spring: Pre-school-year prep — enrolment families start arriving. Book 4–6 weeks ahead.
advice.summer: Peak season — Christmas, New Year, and Feb intake. Highest prices, tightest availability. Book 8–12 weeks ahead.
advice.autumn: Best window for actual school visits — schools are in session, easy to observe and meet staff.
advice.winter: Lowest prices. Ski-trip dates push some weekends higher; confirm school holidays before planning visits.

Booking.title: Book your stay
Booking.estimateNote: Estimate based on the base nightly rate. Cleaning fee is added at checkout.
Booking.testModeNotice: Test mode — no real charges. Use Stripe test card 4242 4242 4242 4242 to try the flow.

DatePicker.title: Select dates
DatePicker.subtitle: Add your travel dates for exact pricing

DirectBooking.title: You're booking direct with us
DirectBooking.subtitle: Typically around 10–15% cheaper than Airbnb / Booking.com — no platform fees added on top.
DirectBooking.disclaimer: Airbnb adds a ~14–16% guest service fee, and Booking.com bakes platform commission into the displayed price. Booking direct here skips both.

Checkout.subtitle: For: {listing}
Checkout.testModeNotice: Test mode — this is the Stripe test environment. Use card 4242 4242 4242 4242 with any future expiry and any CVC. No real money moves. Note: test payments still create real reservations on the host's Hostaway calendar (Hostaway has no sandbox).
Checkout.missingStripeKey: Stripe publishable key (NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY) isn't configured. Please contact the site admin.
Checkout.paymentIncomplete: Payment didn't complete (status: {status}). Please try again.
Checkout.reservationProcessing: We're creating your booking now — confirmation email to follow.

Inquiry.title: Message the host
Inquiry.subtitle: Your message goes to the host by email. About: {listing}
Inquiry.messagePlaceholder: Tell the host about your trip: purpose, kids' ages, schools of interest, price flexibility, etc.
Inquiry.missingHostEmail: Host inbox (INQUIRY_EMAIL) isn't configured yet, so submit is disabled. Please contact the site admin.
Inquiry.mailtoNote: Clicking "Open my email app" opens a pre-filled message in your default email app — you can review it before hitting send.

Amenities.title: What this place offers
Amenities.showAll: Show all {count, plural, one {# amenity} other {# amenities}}
